quoted_text: With codex I don't need a second monitor I turned it into a standing desk
Built Petdex, a public gallery to discover, share, and install Codex pets with one curl. Submissions open at link below.

text: such a fun launch - try "/pet hi" in Codex app:
quoted_text: Pets. Now in Codex. Use /pet to wake your pet.

text: Codex as the everything productivity app
quoted_text: Codex redefines my workflow to the point where I should probably buy a new machine. Last year I bought a 36GB M4 Pro MBP thinking it was a rocketship. Now I can work back and forth across 4 apps using Codex instead of scrolling Twitter while it builds or thinks.

text: codex now has a built in Ralph loop++:
quoted_text: Codex 0.128.0 is huge. Codex is moving more goal oriented with a new /goal command: /goal <objective> to set a new goal; after agent turn finishes, Codex injects a message nudging the model to pick the next step.

text: codex for the little things that you would otherwise spend lots of time on
quoted_text: I repeatedly use Computer Use in Codex to add things to my family calendar in Apple Calendar. I gave it a schedule for the next four months, and it handled the calendar work.
